sagemaker.inferenceexperiment.capturecon: Configuration specifying how to treat different headers. If no headers are specified SageMaker will by default base64 encode when capturing the data.

sagemaker.inferenceexperiment.capturecon.Description: The list of all content type headers that SageMaker will treat as CSV and capture accordingly.
The list of all content type headers that SageMaker will treat as JSON and capture accordingly.
